note: Approved period-bounded open-weight checkpoints for historical WMv2 backtesting. OpenRouter metadata is discovery evidence, not temporal proof. effective_temporal_boundary = exact_checkpoint_public_release_timestamp (NOT the knowledge cutoff): every benchmark question must OPEN strictly after it.

models.structured_output_capability: json-in-prose with parse_json extraction (repo contract); verified in smoke test

models.mutable_serving_limitation: OpenRouter/WandB cannot prove the serving endpoint is byte-identical to HF revision 1605565b… or that it was never silently updated. Tier A requires a dedicated hash-verified deployment of the same frozen benchmark.
